overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character in dark robes walking along a misty stone pathway through a mountainous landscape at dusk. The scene features historic stone architecture, atmospheric purple-blue lighting, and transitions from a walled path across a bridge to an open rocky trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone walled pathway through misty highlands

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a wet cobblestone pathway bordered by stone walls, heading toward distant castle ruins

entered.detail: tall weathered stone wall running along the left side of the path
tall weathered stone wall running along the right side of the path
lit wooden lamp post with warm yellow glow mounted on the right wall
ruined stone castle or tower visible on the hillside in the distance
sparse trees with autumn-colored leaves lining the path

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow cobblestone path enclosed by high stone walls in a misty, dimly lit highland setting. A lit wooden lamp post provides warm light on the right, while distant castle ruins are visible through the haze ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient stone bridge with cairn markers

events.description: distant robed figure becomes visible standing motionless on the bridge ahead
character crosses onto the stone bridge section with stacked stone cairns on the walls

agents.ego_description: approaching and passing a stationary robed figure standing on the stone bridge

notable_agents.action: standing motionless on the bridge wearing dark robes, facing away from the camera

entered.detail: ancient stone bridge with weathered cobblestones and low walls
stacked flat stones forming a cairn marker on the bridge wall

segments.scene_description: The character walks onto an ancient stone bridge marked by stacked stone cairns, approaching a stationary robed figure standing in the middle of the path. The stone walls continue alongside but appear more weathered and lower than in the previous section.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky mountain trail with wooden lamp posts

events.description: character turns left at the path junction, leaving the bridge
path opens into a wider rocky valley with distant mountain views

agents.ego_description: turning left at a junction and continuing along a winding dirt path through rocky terrain with cliffs on both sides

entered.detail: large moss-covered rock outcrop forming the left boundary of the trail
large weathered rock formation forming the right boundary of the trail
lit wooden lamp post on the left side of the new path section
misty mountain peaks visible in the distance through the valley

segments.scene_description: After turning left at the bridge junction, the character proceeds along a wider dirt trail flanked by large rocky cliffs and boulders. A wooden lamp post appears on the left, and the path opens into a misty valley with distant mountain peaks visible ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a confined, misty highland corridor that gradually opens into a vast mountain valley. It begins with a character walking along a narrow cobblestone path enclosed by high stone walls, where a single wooden lamp post casts a warm glow against the dim haze and distant castle ruins. As the path leads forward, the walls weather and lower, transitioning into an ancient stone bridge marked by stacked cairns and a stationary robed figure. The scene then shifts as the camera turns left at a junction, moving from the stone bridge onto a wider dirt trail flanked by massive rocky cliffs and boulders. Finally, the path expands further, passing another lamp post to reveal a wide, misty valley with distant mountain peaks stretching toward the horizon.
